name: Preacher
focus: Full-service creative and brand agency. Austin-based. Known for challenger brands, cultural storytelling, and campaign work with a strong POV.
why_relevant: Austin-based means in-person relationship building. Right size for a fractional operator to actually matter. Creative and brand strategy is the lane.

name: McGarrah Jessee
focus: Craft-first independent creative agency. Austin-based. Known for brand storytelling and long-form campaign work with a strong commitment to quality over volume.
why_relevant: Local Austin agency with a long track record. Respected creative voice in the market. Freelance or project-basis entry point.

name: Sunday Afternoon
focus: Small brand studio, Austin. Consumer-focused, design-led. Works with emerging brands on identity and strategy.
why_relevant: Austin-based. Very small means every person matters and project relationships are the norm.

name: Red Antler
focus: Consumer startup brand studio. Behind Casper, Allbirds, Hims, and dozens of category-defining consumer brands. Actively brings in freelance talent on a project basis.
why_relevant: Primary target. Actively uses freelancers. Consumer startups is exactly the terrain. Working Not Working is the right entry point.

name: Mythology
focus: Brand studio with a strong cultural POV. NYC-based. Premium consumer brand work with genuine strategic depth behind the identity work.
why_relevant: Cultural brand work with strategic rigor is the exact overlap. Small enough for a freelancer to have meaningful impact. Project relationships are the entry point.

name: Humanaut
focus: Fully remote-friendly creative agency. Purpose-led and challenger brands. Known for Oatly, Athletic Greens, and brands that take a cultural position.
why_relevant: Fully remote friendly. Purpose-led consumer brands in wellness and lifestyle is exactly James's terrain. Actively uses freelancers.

name: Established
focus: Brand studio focused on consumer brands. NYC-based. Small team that brings in project talent for strategy and creative work.
why_relevant: Consumer brand focus. Small enough that a strong freelancer gets real work. Cultural and brand strategy is the entry point.

name: Quality Meats
focus: Boutique creative studio. Pop culture-savvy, brand-forward work. NYC-based with a specific editorial and cultural intelligence in the output.
why_relevant: Pop culture and brand work is the right intersection. Small studio means project work is the primary model. Cultural fluency is the entry point.

name: Oddfellows
focus: Motion and brand studio. Remote-friendly. Known for animated brand work and clients with strong cultural identity.
why_relevant: Remote-friendly. Brand and cultural work is the overlap. Strategy and partnerships framing is the natural entry point.

name: Franklyn
focus: Small brand studio, NYC. Craft and identity-focused. Selective client roster. Known for restraint and precision in brand work.
why_relevant: Small studio means every relationship matters. Brand and cultural work. Project-based model is the norm here.

name: Athletics
focus: Brand studio known for consumer and cultural brand work. NYC-based. Strong brand and identity work with a genuine editorial sensibility.
why_relevant: Consumer and cultural brand focus is the right lane. Small studio model. Project relationships are the entry point.

name: Gretel
focus: Highly selective small brand studio, NYC. Known for Netflix, HBO, and high-end cultural clients. Very deliberate about project selection.
why_relevant: Selective but prestigious. Cultural and entertainment focus is right. Media and brand fluency matters here more than anywhere.

name: Focus Lab
focus: Remote-first brand and design studio. Growing into consumer brand territory. Strong studio model with freelance network.
why_relevant: Remote-first means accessibility. Growing into consumer brand territory is the window. Strong freelance network.

name: Sibling Rivalry
focus: Small creative studio. Known for editorial and cultural brand work with a strong visual and conceptual POV.
why_relevant: Editorial and cultural work is exactly the overlap. Small enough for project relationships to be meaningful.

name: Hecho
focus: Boutique agency focused on cultural brands and multicultural audiences. Work that reflects genuine cultural fluency not surface-level translation.
why_relevant: Cultural brand focus is the exact intersection. Boutique means relationships matter and a freelancer with real cultural intelligence has a home here.

name: Heroes & Ghosts
focus: Small creative studio. Brand and cultural work with a consumer focus. Known for work that takes a strong creative position.
why_relevant: Consumer brand and cultural work. Small studio model means project relationships are how they grow. Creative strategist is the natural entry.

name: And Rising
focus: LA-based creative studio, remote-friendly. Creative capital model — brings in freelance talent as a core part of how the work gets done. Consumer and cultural brand focus.
why_relevant: Remote-friendly. The creative capital model means freelance relationships are built into how they operate. Consumer and cultural brand focus is the lane.

name: Bullish
focus: Hybrid creative agency and consumer brand venture. Works with emerging consumer brands at the intersection of strategy, creative, and investment. Unusual and interesting brief.
why_relevant: Consumer brand focus at the strategy and commercial layer is exactly the overlap. Hybrid model means diverse briefs and real partnership potential.

name: Teak
focus: Small brand studio. Consumer brand and strategy focus. Known for thoughtful identity and positioning work.
why_relevant: Small enough for a meaningful project relationship. Consumer brand and strategy focus is the lane.

name: Superhero Cheesecake
focus: Boutique NYC creative studio. Brand and cultural work. Known for pop culture-fluent brand identity and campaign work.
why_relevant: Cultural and brand work at boutique scale. Project-based model. Pop culture fluency is the entry point.

name: Waterfall
focus: Small brand and strategy studio. Consumer and cultural focus. Works at the intersection of insight and identity.
why_relevant: Brand and strategy studio is the exact overlap. Small means project relationships matter and every freelancer who fits the brief gets real work.

name: Dazed Studio
focus: Creative and cultural strategy studio from Dazed Media. Maintains a freelance network of cultural strategists and creatives. Remote-friendly for the right collaborators. Works where culture and commerce meet.
why_relevant: Explicitly maintains a freelance network. Cultural strategy is the exact brief. The connective tissue story — data to creative to commercial — maps directly to what they bring to brands.

name: Cassette
focus: Cultural strategy consultancy. Works with brands on cultural insight, trend intelligence, and positioning. Boutique and selective.
why_relevant: Cultural strategy is the direct overlap. Boutique consultancy model means project relationships are the norm. James's through line maps exactly.

name: Canvas8
focus: Cultural intelligence and consumer insight firm. Publishes research and works with global brands on audience and trend strategy. Maintains a contributor network of cultural analysts.
why_relevant: Cultural and consumer intelligence is the direct overlap with the data-to-strategy-to-commercial approach. Maintains a contributor and freelance network — the right entry point.

name: Sparks & Honey
focus: Cultural intelligence and trend strategy consultancy. Works with large brands on cultural foresight and consumer insight. Known for a methodology that connects emerging signals to brand strategy.
why_relevant: Cultural intelligence is the exact through line. The connective tissue story — data to strategy to creative to commercial — maps directly to what they sell to brands.
